reason: Successfully tested agent chat functionality: navigated to the app, located agent, verified status, sent math question, and verified correct response.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Success. App loaded with "Your Agents" page showing.
Step 2: Found and clicked agent "QA-20260629-214212-jcyi" in the sidebar - Success. Agent page loaded with chat interface.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Success. Agent status showed "idle" in top-right corner.
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Success. Message was typed into input field and send button clicked.
Step 5: Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) - Success. Agent responded within 1 second.
Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Success. Agent responded with "2 + 2 = 4" which clearly mentions the number "4". Screenshot captured showing the conversation.
